home.title: Hi, I'm Antoine
home.subtitle: Fullstack Developer
home.description: Building modern web experiences with Vue, Nuxt & cutting-edge tech.
home.aboutDescription: I'm a passionate Fullstack Developer currently pursuing a Master's Degree at Epitech Rennes, while gaining real-world experience through my apprenticeship at Digitaleo. I enjoy building modern, scalable web applications using Vue, Nuxt, and TypeScript.
home.quote: Crafting clean & scalable web experiences, one line of code at a time.

journey2024.title: Fullstack Developer - Digitaleo
journey2024.description: In charge of developing and maintaining the email editor of the platform, ensuring smooth UX and strong compatibility (Outlook, responsive...).

journey2023.title: Master's Degree - Epitech Rennes
journey2023.description: Specializing in Artificial Intelligence & Data, focusing on machine learning, data science, and innovative solutions.

portfolio.description: My personal developer portfolio showcasing projects, skills, and experience. Built with Vue.js, Nuxt, and Tailwind CSS for a clean and modern design.

designSystem.description: A Storybook instance showcasing a design system built with Vue.js and Tailwind CSS. It includes reusable components, documentation, and interactive examples for UI development.

sapia.description: A general knowledge platform built with Nuxt, Vue.js, and Tailwind CSS. It offers an interactive experience to test and expand your knowledge across a wide range of topics through quizzes and curated content.
